title: Large Video to Transcript
description: Submit a video or audio file. We create the MP3, timestamped transcript exports, quality report, and ZIP bundle.

media.title: Submit video or audio
media.description: Upload a file or paste a direct media URL. For files over 500 MB, a direct URL is faster than browser upload.

mediaFiles.title: Legacy uploaded media files
mediaFiles.description: Backward-compatible hidden field. Use media instead.

mediaUrls.title: Legacy direct media URLs
mediaUrls.description: Backward-compatible hidden field. Use media instead.

language.title: Language
language.description: Language hint such as en. Leave empty only when you want provider auto-detection.

keyterms.title: Key terms
keyterms.description: Domain-specific names or terms, one per line. Used by providers that support glossary/keyterm prompting.

includeZip.title: Create ZIP bundle
includeZip.description: Include TXT, JSON, SRT, VTT, and quality report in a downloadable ZIP.

transcriptConcurrency.title: Chunk concurrency
transcriptConcurrency.description: Concurrent provider requests for chunked long-audio transcription.

requireSuccessfulCharge.title: Require successful billing
requireSuccessfulCharge.description: Production safety switch. When enabled, transcript artifacts are delivered only after the configured Apify pay-per-event charge succeeds.

openaiApiKey.title: OpenAI API key
openaiApiKey.description: Optional. If omitted, the Actor uses its encrypted OPENAI_API_KEY environment variable.

elevenlabsApiKey.title: ElevenLabs API key
elevenlabsApiKey.description: Optional. If omitted, the Actor uses its encrypted ELEVENLABS_API_KEY environment variable.
